name: Zocdoc Patient Scheduling and Provider Discovery API
what_it_does: Zocdoc patient scheduling and provider discovery REST API for health systems, insurers, and digital health platforms to surface provider availability and enable direct appointment booking through Zocdoc's consumer marketplace. Enables AI agents to manage provider inventory and availability publication for healthcare scheduling marketplace automation, handle appointment booking and confirmation for patient access automation, access insurance acceptance and plan verification for patient eligibility matching automation, retrieve provider profile and specialty data for provider directory management automation, manage appointment reminder and patient communication for scheduling engagement automation, handle cancellation and rescheduling workflow for appointment lifecycle automation, access new patient flow and intake for first appointment onboarding automation, retrieve patient reviews and provider rating for healthcare quality signaling automation, manage telehealth and in-person appointment type configuration for hybrid care scheduling automation, and integrate Zocdoc with EHR scheduling systems for bi-directional appointment booking management.
use_cases: Publishing provider availability from health system scheduling automation agents
Booking patient appointments from digital health platform agents
Verifying insurance acceptance from patient access automation agents
Managing appointment lifecycle from healthcare scheduling agents
not_for: Inpatient hospital scheduling and bed management
Emergency and urgent care on-demand dispatch
Mental health and behavioral health specialized marketplaces (use Headway or Alma)
best_when: A health system, medical group, or insurer wanting AI agents to automate provider availability publishing, new patient appointment booking, insurance verification, and scheduling workflow within Zocdoc's consumer-facing healthcare scheduling marketplace.
avoid_when: PROVIDER CREDENTIALING ACCURACY IN PUBLIC DIRECTORY: Automated provider profile publication via Zocdoc must maintain accurate credentialing and specialty information; inaccurate provider specialty or board certification in Zocdoc creates patient access failure and potential licensing board complaint for scope-of-practice misrepresentation. INSURANCE PLAN ACCEPTANCE DATA FRESHNESS: Automated insurance acceptance data via Zocdoc provider profiles must reflect current accepted plans; stale insurance acceptance data creates patient scheduling for providers who no longer accept the patient's plan creating billing dispute. HIPAA FOR APPOINTMENT SCHEDULING DATA: Automated appointment scheduling data exchanged with Zocdoc (patient name, DOB, insurance, provider selection) constitutes PHI; Zocdoc operates as HIPAA Business Associate; automated integration must maintain Zocdoc BAA and HIPAA-compliant data exchange; non-BAA Zocdoc integration creates HIPAA violation.

auth.notes: Zocdoc uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes for health system and payer integrations. REST API with JSON. New York, New York HQ. Founded 2007 by Cyrus Massoumi, Nick Ganju, and Oliver Kharraz. Private (~$225M raised). Patient scheduling marketplace connecting patients to healthcare providers. 10,000+ insurance plans accepted. Real-time appointment availability. Epic and Cerner EHR integration for bi-directional scheduling. HIPAA Business Associate. Competes with Kyruus, NexHealth, and Luma Health for patient scheduling.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-provider subscription or enterprise health system agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-provider monthly subscription for independent practices; enterprise health system agreement for large groups; API access included in enterprise engagement
pricing.notes: New York NY. Private (~$225M raised). Founded 2007. Per-provider subscription. Enterprise system agreements. HIPAA BAA required. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; availability and booking queries throttled; webhooks for appointment events

known_agent_gotchas: AVAILABILITY SLOT CONCURRENCY ON POPULAR PROVIDERS: Zocdoc availability for high-demand providers may have concurrent booking race condition; automated booking agents for primary care and specialist providers in high-demand markets must handle slot-already-booked error response and retry with next available slot; do not present slot as confirmed until Zocdoc booking confirmation response received

INSURANCE VERIFICATION REAL-TIME VS CACHED: Zocdoc insurance acceptance data may have caching lag; automated patient scheduling that relies on cached insurance acceptance data may book patient with provider who recently changed insurance panels; implement insurance acceptance freshness check for automated bookings in insurance-sensitive scheduling workflows

EHR SCHEDULING INTEGRATION APPOINTMENT TYPE MAPPING: Zocdoc appointment types must map to EHR scheduling templates; automated Zocdoc appointment booking that does not match to correct EHR template creates scheduling exception that requires manual reconciliation; maintain Zocdoc-to-EHR appointment type mapping for automated bi-directional scheduling

NEW PATIENT vs ESTABLISHED PATIENT ROUTING: Zocdoc displays different availability for new vs established patients; automated scheduling workflow must correctly specify patient type for provider availability query; automated new patient booking in established-patient-only slots creates scheduling conflict in provider schedule

PROVIDER PROFILE DATA SYNC FROM CREDENTIALING SOURCE: Automated provider profile updates via Zocdoc must originate from credentialing and practice management system as source of truth; automated Zocdoc updates that conflict with credentialing source creates provider profile inconsistency across patient-facing directories

APPOINTMENT REMINDER TIMING HIPAA MESSAGING: Automated Zocdoc appointment reminder communication contains PHI (appointment time, provider name, location); HIPAA minimum necessary standard applies to reminder content; automated reminder must not include diagnosis, referral reason, or insurance information beyond appointment logistics to minimize PHI in notification channels
agent_readiness.security_notes: Patient scheduling. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Patient PHI, appointment data, and provider scheduling information.

security_score_components.security_notes: Patient scheduling. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Patient PHI, appointment, and provider scheduling data.
